title: ArmorEffect
description: Provides armor parts with customizable effect
body:
# ArmorEffect
Required Plugin: https://modrinth.com/plugin/kotlinplugins

Provides customizable armor parts that provide effects to the players while worn.

ArmorParts include all vanilla armors ( including turtle helmet! ) 
- Usage: ```/armoreffect <ClickTabToAutoCompleteArmorPart> <ClickTabToAutoCompleteEffect> [LevelOfTheEffect]```
- Required permission to use the command: ```armoreffect.give```
- Players with op (/op nickname) have this required permission by default.

The purpose of this plugin is to extend rarity of armors, improve the pvp experience.  
- Check out other plugins: https://modrinth.com/user/Winlyps
